message:
✨ Add mode switching skeleton support for smooth demo/live transitions (#748)

* ✨ Add mode switching skeleton support for smooth demo/live transitions

Integrates useIsModeSwitching() hook across key dashboards and components
to show animated skeletons during mode transitions:

- CardWrapper: Forces skeleton during mode switch for all cards
- StatsOverview: Shows skeleton stat blocks during transitions
- Clusters: Shows cluster card skeletons during mode switch
- Workloads: Shows workload list skeletons during mode switch
- Pods: Shows pod issue skeletons during mode switch
- Security: Includes mode switching in skeleton trigger logic
- ClusterCardSkeleton: Adds animated refresh icon to skeletons

This ensures users see smooth loading states when toggling between
demo and live modes, preventing flash of empty content.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* ✨ Add mode switching skeleton support to Network dashboard

Integrates useIsModeSwitching() hook into Network.tsx to show
skeleton states during demo/live mode transitions, completing
mode switching support for all dashboards with skeleton logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
